attributes.name: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Average database request latency 99.5% rolling 30 days
attributes.description: Tracks average request latency across Redis Enterprise databases, ensuring 99.5% of 1-minute windows maintain average latency below 5 milliseconds (0.005s) over a rolling 30-day period. Redis is expected to deliver sub-millisecond responses; sustained latency above this threshold indicates memory pressure, fork operations, hot shards, or network issues impacting application performance.
